plans.title: Muni five-layer enactment for .project/
plans.description: Restructure .project/ from flat-block storage into a layered model where each layer owns its own findings, decisions, and lifecycle. Enacted by hand initially as the test case for what pi-project must eventually generate natively. The hand-enactment itself reveals the framework gaps (captured in framework-gaps.json) that the consumer migration arc must address for the layered structure to become expressible as configuration rather than manual scaffolding.
